{{Quote|Governor Jander Graff ''[sic]'', busily working to replace departing Senator Gabrial Atanna's bureaucracy, has not yet commented on the blockade, through one key official on his transition team stated off the record that the Governor hopes to have normalized trade relations to Ralltiir restored within a month.|[[Deena Mipps]], [[Darpa SectorNet]]|<ref name="GNN3" />}}
'''Gabrial Atanna''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] from the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Esseles/Legends|Esseles]] in the [[Core Worlds/Legends|Core Worlds]]. He served as Esseles' [[Senator/Legends|senator]] in the senates of both the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] and its successor state, the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]], until [[Galactic Emperor/Legends|Emperor]] [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]] [[Dissolution of the Imperial Senate/Legends|dissolved]] the body in [[0 BBY/Legends|0 BBY]]. Retiring to [[Gabrial Atanna's estate|his estate]] in the [[City/Legends|city]] of [[Calamar]] on his [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]] with [[Gabrial Atanna's wife|his wife]], Atanna [[Spy/Legends|spied]] on Esseles' defense industries for the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]]. After Atanna was compromised and arrested by the Empire, Alliance teams were dispatched to rescue him as well as his wife and grandchildren.

==Biography==
Gabrial Atanna was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] native of the [[Core Worlds/Legends|Core World]] [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Esseles/Legends|Esseles]] and was appointed as [[Senator/Legends|senator]] of Esseles to the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] [[Galactic Senate/Legends|Senate]].<ref name="ITCW" /> As senator, Atanna was provided with the [[Esprix Estate]], the official residence of Esseles' senator.<ref name="Coruscant">''[[Coruscant and the Core Worlds]]''</ref> In [[19 BBY/Legends|19 BBY]],<ref name="TEA">''[[The Essential Atlas]]''</ref> the Republic was reformed into the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] following the conclusion of the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]],<ref name="RotS">{{Film|III}}</ref> and Atanna continued to represent Esseles in the new [[Imperial Senate/Legends|Imperial Senate]]. In [[0 BBY/Legends|0 BBY]], [[Galactic Emperor/Legends|Emperor]] [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]] [[Dissolution of the Imperial Senate/Legends|dissolved]] the Imperial Senate, handing control of the Imperial [[Bureaucrat/Legends|bureaucracy]] to the regional Imperial [[Governor/Legends|governors]]. Atanna's responsibility for Esseles was taken over by [[Moff/Legends|Moff]] [[Jander Graffe]], who set about replacing the bureaucracy that Atanna had built.<ref name="GNN3" />

Atanna and [[Gabrial Atanna's wife|his wife]] retired to a suburb in the [[City/Legends|city]] of [[Calamar]] on Esseles, where the former senator kept a low profile, avoiding attention from the Empire and local [[Politics/Legends|political]] parties. During this [[Time/Legends|time]], he worked as a [[Spy/Legends|spy]] for the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]], secretly passing on information regarding defense industry programs on Esseles. While on an off-world business trip during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], Atanna was compromised and arrested by the Empire.<ref name="ITCW" />

{{RPGseed}}
An Alliance extraction team was dispatched to rescue Atanna from Imperial [[Prison/Legends|incarceration]], while a second team headed to Esseles, where his wife and grandchildren were being held under house arrest at the former senator's [[Gabrial Atanna's estate|estate]]. The team successfully rescued the family, neutralizing around fifteen guards and several security devices to do so. [[Smuggler/Legends|Smuggling]] them off-world was harder, as Esseles Governor [[Griff Takel]] had ordered all [[Starship/Legends|starships]] leaving the planet to be thoroughly searched due to Moff Graffe's indication that he would be very displeased if Atanna's family escaped. However, the Alliance team was able to exfiltrate the planet and take Atanna's family to a secret rendezvous point, where they were to be transferred to an Alliance [[Safe world/Legends|safe world]].<ref name="ITCW" />
{{Endgame}}

==Personality and traits==
Gabrial Atanna was a competent senator, serving in the position as Esseles' representative for two governments. However, Atanna held no loyalty to the Empire and willingly served as a spy for the Alliance to Restore the Republic. Atanna's service to the Alliance was valued, and when he was captured by Imperial authorities, the Alliance devoted resources to rescuing both him and his family.<ref name="ITCW" />

==Behind the scenes==
Gabrial Atanna was first mentioned in ''[[Galaxywide NewsNets]]'', which was published in [[Star Wars Adventure Journal 3|''Star Wars Adventure Journal'' 3]] by [[West End Games]] in [[1994]] and written by [[Paul Sudlow]].<ref name="GNN3" />
